full_text:
Hu Hua 胡華
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Hua (胡華). Father of Hu Ban. Retired officer of the court under Emperor Huan. Met Guan Yu. Hu Hua is a fictional character. Hu Hua was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
